violations.text: The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by small droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

The walls in the back kitchen area is in poor repair (broken wall tile near hand sink and openings around piping near washer). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The floors in the back kitchen storage areas, under the lobby soda machine, and storage closets have an accumulation of droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Staff were observed cleaning areas during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tongs) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

(Liquid yogurt) was observed held at (55 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The presence of (fruit flies ) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

(Frappe Lowboy ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Am bient temperatures observed at 55df. Establishment not allowed to store any TCs food in unit until repaired and/or replaced. PIC moved all items that was placed in unit 1.5 hours prior to inspection into walk in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The condensate from the (2 DR reach in) refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
The (wall ) in the (employee break room ) area is in poor repair. Observed damaged/missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

The presence of (flies) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

Beverage cooler located in the (drive thru)area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 45DF.PIC removed dairy products and placed into another working unit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage counters in drive thru area have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

The metal door framing in the walk in freezer is in poor repair. Observed metal framing detaching from frame and dents in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of the freezer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
